data.content: [Claude planning 2026-04-02] Revised plan v4: keep current Loom vocabulary (remote_main, pr, remote, local) as canonical names. Add ArtifactTarget enum with FromStr validation and new target types (branch, note, approval, live_deployment). Validate in TOML/JSON parsers. No .loom file changes, no prompt template changes, no bundle regeneration. ~90 lines across 5 files. Key insight: renaming would break 4 prompt templates that have {{ output }} conditionals matching remote_main and pr.
